name: Home Deco Puzzles
short_description: The joy of building miniature interiors mixed into a relaxing memory puzzle game. Memorize, Unpack, Decorate!
detailed_description:
🏡 Home Deco Puzzles

Home Deco Puzzles combines the calming charm of miniature interior design with a clever memory-based puzzle experience. Unpack, decorate, and relax — one room at a time.

🧠 MEMORIZE

Take a good look! Each room is fully furnished for a brief moment. Try to memorize the position of every item based on its surroundings and the subtle differences between similar objects.

📦 UNPACK

Suddenly, everything is packed into boxes. Your task now is to unpack and return each item to its original location — but be careful, not everything is where you think it was!

🪑 DECORATE

Recreate the room by placing items back into their correct positions. Can you restore the room perfectly from memory, or will you rely on logic and visual cues?

✨ Features

  • 🏠 60 handcrafted levels across a wide range of cozy environments

  • 🧩 Four unique room types: Small Rooms, Double Rooms, Penthouse Apartments, and Studio Lofts

  • 🌈 Various themes including Living Rooms, Coffee Shops, Modern Lofts, and more

  • 🔍 Hint system – replay the original layout if you're stuck

  • 🎁 Daily rewards – come back every day for bonuses

  • 📋 Daily quests to keep the challenge fresh and rewarding

  • 🎵 Peaceful and relaxing soundtrack for a mindful experience

  • 🧘‍♂️ A meditative blend of memory, logic, and decoration mechanics

  • 👪 Easy to pick up, fun for all ages

Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or simply looking for a relaxing way to spend your time, Home Deco Puzzles offers a soothing and satisfying experience. Perfect for short sessions or long playthroughs.

Can you recreate the perfect room from memory?
